name: NotDiamond

performance.notes: Router overhead ~50ms; routes to fastest/best model for the query

agent_readiness.notes: LLM router that selects best model per query based on task type and cost/quality tradeoffs. Supports GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, Llama. LiteLLM-compatible. Automatic routing with custom constraints (max_cost, preferred_providers). Quality + cost optimization.

gotchas: Early stage — routing decisions may not always match expectations
Requires all target model API keys configured
Router overhead adds latency (~50ms) to every call
Not suitable for real-time latency-sensitive applications
best_when: Applications using multiple LLMs wanting automatic best-model selection
Cost optimization: route simple queries to cheaper models, complex to expensive
A/B testing model performance without code changes
Agents that need different models for different subtask types
avoid_when: Applications locked to single LLM provider
Simple use cases that don't benefit from multi-model routing
summary: NotDiamond is an LLM router that automatically selects the best model per query based on task complexity and cost/quality tradeoffs. Routes between GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, and open models. LiteLLM-compatible for easy integration. Best for applications using multiple LLMs that want intelligent routing without manual model selection logic.
